partB.note: Standard premium for beneficiaries at base IRMAA bracket (income ≤$103K single / ≤$206K married)

partD.note: Part D base premium varies by plan; $0 base IRMAA surcharge for income ≤$103K single / ≤$206K married. MA-PD plans often $0 premium.

partA.note: Part A is premium-free for those with 40+ work credits (10+ years Medicare taxes paid)
